theme_and_archetype.description: A 'Dark Elegant' SaaS interface combining the density and authority of a Control Room (Admin) with the high-visibility, tactical precision of a Performance UI (Driver). Uses deep obsidian backgrounds to reduce glare and eye strain, accented with Electric Blue for primary actions and Warning Red for logistics anomalies.

guidelines: Headings must use tight letter spacing.
Use JetBrains Mono for shipment IDs, timestamps, and Eco-scores.

rules: Navigation must be at the bottom of the screen.
Primary action buttons must be large (h-14 or h-16) and placed in the bottom thumb-reach zone.
Use vertical lists with large hit areas.
Employ 'Swipe to Confirm' patterns for critical actions (e.g., Delivery Complete) to prevent accidental taps.
High contrast text for outdoor visibility.
Sidebar navigation for quick module switching.
Top row: Key metric cards (Cash-flow, Active Litiges, Eco-score).
Center: Dense data tables for shipments and map for live tracking.
Use 1px borders and flat backgrounds for widgets, avoiding soft shadows in dark mode.
Centered, focused layout over a cinematic map background.
Use Glassmorphism (bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border-white/10) for the tracking card.
Emphasize the progress bar and current status.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0066FF] text-white hover:bg-[#0052CC] transition-colors rounded-lg font-semibold
buttons.alert: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white hover:bg-[#D63026] transition-colors rounded-lg font-semibold
buttons.driver_action: w-full h-16 text-lg rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-3

inputs.default: bg-[#0A0A0B] border border-[#27272A] rounded-lg text-white focus:border-[#0066FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0066FF] h-12

motion_and_interaction.hover: Subtle background lightening (hover:bg-[#1A1A1E]) on table rows and list items.
motion_and_interaction.active: Scale down active:scale-[0.98] on mobile driver cards and buttons.
motion_and_interaction.feedback: Use red pulsating dots (animate-pulse) for active alerts/litiges.
motion_and_interaction.loading: Use skeleton loaders with dark shimmer (bg-zinc-800 to bg-zinc-700) instead of spinners where possible.

transporter_pro.description: Transporter-Pro logo, stylized electric blue forward arrow on black.

dark_map.description: Abstract glowing high-tech city map with neon blue routing lines.
dark_map.placement: Live Tracking Map background, Client Portal background

ai_damage_scan.description: AI scanning cardboard package for damage.
ai_damage_scan.placement: AI Anti-Litige module, Photo Capture flow

delivery_truck_night.description: Modern delivery truck driving at night.
delivery_truck_night.placement: Hero image for marketing or auth background

driver_portrait.placement: Driver profile, testimonial, or demo data

happy_customer.description: Woman signing for a package at doorstep.
happy_customer.placement: Client portal success state, E-CMR signature screen context

requirements: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='driver-accept-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a mobile-first 'Driver Dashboard' emphasizing one-hand operation: massive buttons, bottom-placed actions, and large text.
Implement an 'Admin Dashboard' using a dark grid layout, prioritizing data density and high-contrast red alerts for litiges/delays.
Ensure the 'White Label Client Portal' uses the provided dark_map background with glassmorphism components centered on screen.
Use the specific 'Bleu Électrique' (#0066FF) for all primary CTAs.
Do NOT use placeholder text for images. Use the precise URLs provided in the media_and_assets section.
Structure UI strictly with Tailwind utility classes defined in the component_rules.
Use JWT-based custom auth for B2B SaaS.
